user.title: Energy Dispatcher
user.description: Set up global sensors and price thresholds. Add loads afterwards from the integration page.

sensors.name: Sensors
sensors.description: Select sensors for spot price and grid power in/out.

data_description.price_sensor: Sensor with current and upcoming hourly prices (today/tomorrow). E.g. Nord Pool, Tibber.
data_description.grid_input_sensor: Instantaneous power from the grid (W). Positive = import.
data_description.grid_output_sensor: Instantaneous power to the grid (W). Positive = export/surplus.

export.name: Export price (hub)
export.description: Fixed compensation added to spot price to estimate export revenue for the whole home. Not the same as the per-load self-consumption threshold.

data_description.export_price_offset: Export price = spot price + this compensation. E.g. spot 0.30 + 0.20 = export 0.50. Same unit as your price sensor.

power_guard.name: Power guard
power_guard.description: Optional protection against high grid import per hour.

data_description.power_guard_strategy: Disabled = no limit. Hourly limit = max kWh per clock hour.
data_description.power_guard_hourly_limit_kwh: Only used with hourly limit strategy. E.g. 2.0 = max 2 kWh import per hour.

price_thresholds.name: Price thresholds (grid)
price_thresholds.description: Classifies spot price as free, cheap, normal, or expensive.

data_description.price_free_threshold: Spot price at or below this value = GRID_FREE. Same unit as price sensor.
data_description.price_cheap_ratio: Spot price below this fraction of weekly average = GRID_CHEAP. E.g. 0.30 = 30%.
data_description.price_expensive_ratio: Spot price above this fraction of weekly average = GRID_EXPENSIVE. E.g. 1.50 = 150%.

sensors.description: Select sensors for spot price and grid power in/out.

data_description.price_sensor: Sensor with current and upcoming hourly prices (today/tomorrow). E.g. Nord Pool, Tibber.
data_description.grid_input_sensor: Instantaneous power from the grid (W). Positive = import.
data_description.grid_output_sensor: Instantaneous power to the grid (W). Positive = export/surplus.

export.description: Fixed compensation added to spot price to estimate export revenue for the whole home. Not the same as the per-load self-consumption threshold.

data_description.export_price_offset: Export price = spot price + this compensation. E.g. spot 0.30 + 0.20 = export 0.50. Same unit as your price sensor.

data_description.power_guard_strategy: Disabled = no limit. Hourly limit = max kWh per clock hour.
data_description.power_guard_hourly_limit_kwh: Only used with hourly limit strategy. E.g. 2.0 = max 2 kWh import per hour.

data_description.price_free_threshold: Spot price at or below this value = GRID_FREE. Same unit as price sensor.

data_description.price_expensive_ratio: Spot price above this fraction of weekly average = GRID_EXPENSIVE. E.g. 1.50 = 150%.

user.title: Add load
user.description: Each load gets its own entity (e.g. energy_dispatcher.dehumidifier) for your automations.

basic.name: Basics
basic.description: Name and power requirement for this load.

data_description.name: Display name. Becomes entity id: energy_dispatcher.<lowercase_name>.
data_description.required_power: Power needed to run. Used for export and SOLAR checks.

self_consumption.name: Self-consumption (SOLAR)
self_consumption.description: Controls when this load runs on your own export. Hub export compensation calculates export price — here you set when this load should self-consume instead of selling.

data_description.solar_enabled: Recommend ON (SOLAR) while exporting when export price is low.
data_description.solar_max_export_price: Run on export only if export price (spot + hub compensation) is below this. Leave empty to ignore export price.

runtime.name: Minimum runtime
runtime.description: Optional daily/weekly ON minute quotas. Missing minutes are scheduled on cheapest allowed hours.

data_description.minimum_minutes_per_day: Leave empty for no daily requirement.
data_description.minimum_minutes_per_week: Leave empty for no weekly requirement.

grid_sources.name: Allowed grid prices
grid_sources.description: Which price levels this load may run on from the grid.

basic.name: Basics
basic.description: Name and power requirement for this load.

data_description.name: Display name. Entity id does not change if you rename.
data_description.required_power: Power needed to run this load.

self_consumption.name: Self-consumption (SOLAR)
self_consumption.description: Hub export compensation calculates export price — here you control when this load should self-consume.

data_description.solar_enabled: Recommend ON (SOLAR) on export when export price is low.
data_description.solar_max_export_price: Run on export if export price (spot + hub compensation) is below this. Empty = ignore.

data_description.minimum_minutes_per_day: Leave empty for no daily requirement.
data_description.minimum_minutes_per_week: Leave empty for no weekly requirement.

grid_sources.name: Allowed grid prices
grid_sources.description: Which price levels this load may run on from the grid.

error.load_exists: A load with this name already exists.
